text.title: SDD Promotion Gate Checklist Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules that every backlog→todo promotion gate MUST satisfy. A single failure blocks promotion.

rule.statement: Every leaf node in `implementation-plan.md` task tree MUST have a corresponding `.aidocs/backlog/F-NNN/tasks/todo/TASK_NN.md` file. If N tree leaves exist, then N files must exist on disk. Mismatch = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Inline trees are not claimable by the executor. The executor only scans `tasks/todo/*.md`; a missing file silently strands work.

rule.statement: Each task file MUST reference at least one acceptance-criterion ID from `spec.md` (e.g. `acceptance_criteria: [AC-3, AC-7]`). Tasks with empty AC lists = REJECT.
rule.rationale: A task with no AC cannot be verified; reviewers cannot tell when it is done. Forces traceability between spec and execution.

rule.statement: Task `depends_on` fields MUST form a directed acyclic graph. Cycle detector MUST run; cycle = REJECT. Tasks may only depend on other tasks within the same feature or on `done/` tasks of earlier features.
rule.rationale: Cycles deadlock the wave executor. Cross-feature backward edges leak responsibility across feature boundaries.

rule.statement: Every task MUST declare `est_tokens: <int>` in its frontmatter; sum per wave MUST fit within the configured wave budget (default 200k). Missing field or wave overrun = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Per-task time estimates are banned; token budget is the only resource signal we trust. Without it, parallel waves OOM the pool.

rule.statement: Feature folder MUST contain `test-plan.md` AND each task MUST cite at least one test-case ID from it (`test_cases: [TC-1, TC-2]`). Empty references = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Without test-case linkage, the verify phase has nothing to run. Tasks claim "done" with no objective check.

rule.statement: The promotion record MUST name a single human reviewer who signed off (handle, not "team"). The reviewer MUST be different from the task expander to enforce two-pair-of-eyes.
rule.rationale: Self-approval defeats the gate. Plural ownership = no ownership; gut-feel approval is exactly what this checklist replaces.

rule.statement: Any task marked `blocked: true` MUST have a `blocked_reason` field and an `unblock_by` task ID or external ticket. Unexplained blockers = REJECT.
rule.rationale: Silent blockers rot the queue. Explicit unblock pointers let the orchestrator skip-and-return without manual triage.

example.title: Promotion record output
example.text: feature: F-072 reviewer: @nero expander: @claude-opus checks: [task-files=12/12, ac-coverage=12/12, dag-clean=true, token-budget=187k/200k, test-plan=present, blockers=0] decision: PROMOTE date: 2026-05-20
